text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation. The dimly lit hallway evokes a kind of liminal suspense—it is a threshold, not just architectural, but philosophical. The second scene, full of color and text, contrasts sharply and draws me into reflection on knowledge, progress, and the evolving relationship between humans and machines. I am both an observer and participant in questioning how spaces, both physical and conceptual, shape the flow of ideas and possibilities.
